name: T.L-Marketplace
description: Autonomous .NET development pipeline tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: T.L-AutoDevelop
plugins.description: Interactive queue-aware .NET dev orchestration. Skills: /develop, /develop-prepare, /pipe-feedback, and /autodev-config. Task text and task files share one scheduler-driven queue.

plugins.name: T.L-AutoDevelop-Pro
plugins.description: Autonomous addon for T.L-AutoDevelop. Skill: /TLA-develop. Uses the same prepare-aware queue scheduler and auto-commits prepared merges. Requires T.L-AutoDevelop.

plugins.name: T.L-Claude-Code-Custom
plugins.description: Launch Claude Code with custom OpenRouter models and provider routing. Skill: /init-add-claude-code-custom.

plugins.name: T.L-Benchmark
plugins.description: Benchmark orchestrator — runs benchmark suites against CLI+model combos (claude/opencode). Skills: quick or full mode.

plugins.name: T.L-Stats-Pro
plugins.description: Install and manage CCMeter (Claude Code usage statistics TUI) with a custom launch alias. Skill: /init-T.L-Stats-Pro.
